product.title: Pink Muhly Grass
product.body_html:
Pink Muhly Grass (Muhlenbergia capillaris) is a stunning North American native ornamental grass prized for its spectacular pink plumes in fall.

  • Hardiness Zones: 6-11
  • Sun Exposure: Full Sun
  • Mature Height: 3-4 ft
  • Mature Width: 3-4 ft
  • Bloom Time: Late Summer to Fall
  • Plant Type: Ornamental Grass
